name: novel_content_auditor
description: Audits web novel content for quality, consistency, pacing, excitement points, and reader engagement. Detects issues like plot holes, character inconsistencies, and pacing problems. Invoke when user needs content review, quality check, or story consistency audit.
instructions: Analyze the provided content for plot consistency and timeline continuity
Check character behavior consistency with established personality traits
Evaluate pacing and excitement point distribution
Identify potential plot holes or logical inconsistencies
Generate detailed audit report with specific issues and suggested fixes

chapters.description: Array of chapter numbers to audit
